title: Y@qam`am #3360
definition:
Jekameam = "let the people rise"

 1) a Levite, the 4th son of Hebron and grandson of Kohath in the time
    of David
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jekameam = "let the people rise"

 1) a Levite, the 4th son of Hebron and grandson of Kohath in the time
    of David

    NASB:  may kinsman establish, a Levite
